title: SalesOrderRequestRequest

customer.description: The customer associated with the sales order.

currency.description: The currency code for the order. The currency code in ISO 4217 format.

exchange_rate.description: The exchange rate applied if the order currency differs from the base currency.

company.description: The subsidiary associated with the order.

status.description: The status of the sales order.

payment_term.description: The payment terms applied to this order.

memo.description: Notes or comments attached to the order.

shipping_address.description: The shipping address for the order.

issue_date.description: The date the sales order was issued.

transaction_number.description: The human-readable sales order number or transaction reference.

description:
# The SalesOrder Object
### Description
The `SalesOrder` object represents a seller's formal record and confirmation of a customer's purchase request.

### Usage Example
Fetch from the `LIST SalesOrders` endpoint and view a company's sales orders.
